title: Guess the Soccer Team by Emoji ⚽ (Clues & Answers)
meta_description: Guess the soccer team by emoji — national and club team emoji clues with answers, plus a World Cup emoji quiz. Click any clue to copy it.
hero_h1: Guess the Soccer Team by Emoji
hero_tagline: National and club team emoji clues with answers, plus a World Cup quiz round. Click any clue to copy it.
intro: Turn emojis into a team-guessing game. Each clue below hints at a national side or club through its colours and nicknames — no logos needed — and the answer sits right beside it. Click a clue to copy the emojis for a quiz, story, or party round, then reveal the team.
